title: Add llms.txt and llms-full.txt to documentation site
body: Adds llms.txt support so LLMs can discover and ingest the docs site content at `mono.github.io/SkiaSharp.Extended/`. - **`docs/llms.md`** — Source template for the curated `llms.txt` index with links to all doc pages and API reference - **`docs/llms-full-header.md`** — Header content for the full-text `llms-full.txt` file - **`docs/generate-llms-full.sh`** — Generates both `llms.txt` (from template) and `llms-full.txt` (header + `index.md` + `docs/*.md` glob) at build time - **`docs/docfx.json`** — Both generated files added to DocFX `resource` section; template files excluded from content build - **`.github/workflows/docs-deploy.yml`** — Runs the generation script before the DocFX build step - **`.gitignore`** — Both `docs/llms.txt` and `docs/llms-full.txt` excluded (generated artifacts) When new doc pages are added, `docs/llms.md` needs a new link entry. Article pages are auto-discovered via glob. --- 💬 We'd love your input! Share your thoughts on Copilot coding agent in our [2 minute survey](https://gh.io/copilot-coding-agent-survey).

comments.author: github-actions[bot]

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot please fix

All three review comments addressed in 01c2e05:
- Header moved out of script into `docs/llms-full-header.md`
- Hardcoded file list replaced with `index.md` + `docs/*.md` glob
- `llms.txt` now generated from `docs/llms.md` template, both output files gitignored
